## Pairwise accent similarity (cosine of stacked accent RGB; high = may feel alike)

| A | B | cosine |
| --- | --- | ---: |
| darkmode | midnight | 0.995 |
| sakura | minimal | 0.982 |
| sunset | magicalGirl | 0.992 |
| nordic | obsidian | 0.994 |

## Weak linear gradient (bg vs end ΔRGB < 35)

Themes: `sakura`, `sunset`, `nordic`, `rose`, `magicalGirl`, `alice` — gradient is subtle; rely on glow or bump end color.

_Screenshots are manual; re-run this script after changing `PRESET_THEMES`._
